# Core framework
Django==5.2.15
djangorestframework==3.15.2

# Authentication
djangorestframework-simplejwt==5.3.1

# CORS
django-cors-headers==4.9.0

# Filtering
django-filter==24.3

# Environment variables
django-environ==0.11.2

# Database URL parsing (enables DATABASE_URL=postgres://... for production)
dj-database-url==2.3.0

# Static file serving in production (no separate web server required)
whitenoise==6.9.0

# Auto-generated OpenAPI schema + Swagger/Redoc UI
drf-spectacular==0.28.0

# PostgreSQL driver (optional — only needed when DATABASE_URL points at Postgres)
# Uncomment for production:
# psycopg2-binary==2.9.10
